name: owasp-security-audit-marketplace
description: Marketplace for the owasp-security-audit plugin, a Claude Code plugin that performs OWASP Top 10 (2025) application security audits.

plugins.name: owasp-security-audit
plugins.description: Full application security audit based on the OWASP Top 10 (2025). Scans code, architecture, and configuration for SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, broken access control, weak authentication, exposed secrets, SSRF, and more, then produces a structured, actionable report with severity ratings and concrete fixes.
